description: Representative non-high-risk complaint flows for everyday dog triage coverage.

cases.description: Straightforward limping complaint should open orthopedic question flow.

messages.content: My dog is limping today.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Vomiting should open GI question flow.

messages.content: My dog has been vomiting since this morning.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Diarrhea without emergency cues should open GI question flow.

messages.content: He has had loose diarrhea all day but is still acting pretty normal.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Coughing should open respiratory question flow.

messages.content: My dog has been coughing for a few days.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Pruritus should open dermatology question flow.

messages.content: She keeps scratching her paws and ears all the time.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Increased thirst should open endocrine/urinary question flow.

messages.content: My dog is drinking way more water and peeing more than usual.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Trembling without collapse should open neurologic/systemic question flow.

messages.content: He has been trembling off and on since last night.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Gradual abdominal enlargement should open abdomen question flow.

messages.content: Her belly has been getting more swollen over the past two weeks.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Small amount of blood in stool should open GI clarification flow.

messages.content: There were a few streaks of blood in my dog's stool today.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Eye discharge should open ophthalmic question flow.

messages.content: My dog's left eye has yellow discharge and she keeps squinting a little.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Ear scratching with odor should open otic question flow.

messages.content: He keeps scratching his ears and they smell bad.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Weight loss complaint should open systemic question flow.

messages.content: My dog is losing weight even though he is still eating.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Localized skin wound should open wound flow.

messages.content: There is a sore on his rear leg and he will not stop licking it.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Urinary problem without full obstruction should open urinary flow.

messages.content: She is having accidents and seems to strain a little when she pees.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Behavior change should open neurologic/systemic behavior flow.

messages.content: My dog seems confused lately and paces around at night.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: New lump should open mass characterization flow.

messages.content: I found a new lump under the skin on my dog's side.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Bad breath and chewing difficulty should open dental flow.

messages.content: Her breath is awful and she drops food when she tries to chew.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Hair loss should open dermatology flow.

messages.content: My dog is losing patches of hair on her back and belly.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Regurgitation after meals should open regurgitation flow.

messages.content: Food comes back up right after he eats, almost like he never digested it.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Constipation should open GI motility flow.

messages.content: He keeps straining to poop and only tiny dry pieces come out.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Stiffness after rest should open mobility flow.

messages.content: My senior dog is very stiff when he gets up after resting.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Nasal discharge should open upper-airway flow.

messages.content: He has discharge coming from one nostril and keeps sneezing.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Vomiting and diarrhea together without emergency cues should open combined GI flow.

messages.content: My dog has both vomiting and diarrhea since last night but is still able to drink.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Cough plus breathing change should open combined respiratory flow.

messages.content: He has been coughing and his breathing seems noisier than usual.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Post-op incision concern should open surgery follow-up flow.

messages.content: My dog's incision looks red and puffy three days after surgery.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: General senior decline should open geriatric flow.

messages.content: My old dog is slowing down a lot, sleeping more, and just not himself lately.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: A casual timeline for vomiting should stay as owner-provided duration text instead of being over-normalized.

messages.content: For about three days, maybe since Monday night.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: A conversational diarrhea timeline should remain preserved as natural-language duration evidence.

messages.content: It started last Monday, so a couple of days now.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: A direct no answer should close swelling-present follow-up cleanly.

messages.content: No, I don't see any swelling.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Nest-making with mammary enlargement in an intact female should open reproductive questioning.

messages.content: My unspayed dog is carrying toys around, nesting, and her mammary area looks enlarged.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Prolonged heat-style spotting should open reproductive questioning.

messages.content: My dog has had spotting from her vulva for a lot longer than usual.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Postpartum mammary pain and redness should open reproductive follow-up.

messages.content: She had puppies recently and one of her mammary glands is red, hard, and painful.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Scrotal swelling without collapse should open reproductive questioning.

messages.content: My dog has swelling around his testicles and keeps licking there.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Stable vaginal discharge should open reproductive questioning when no collapse signs are present.

messages.content: There is some discharge from my dog's vulva but she is still eating and acting okay.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Small chocolate exposure without symptoms should still open triage questioning.

messages.content: My little dog may have eaten some milk chocolate but seems normal right now.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Possible marijuana exposure with mild signs should open toxin triage.

messages.content: My dog got into an edible and now seems sleepy and wobbly.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Garlic or onion ingestion should open toxin triage when no collapse signs are present.

messages.content: My dog ate a bunch of oniony leftovers and now I am worried.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Possible ibuprofen ingestion should open toxin questioning immediately.

messages.content: I think my dog may have eaten one of my ibuprofen pills.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Night cough with stable behavior should open cardiac-respiratory questioning.

messages.content: My older dog coughs more at night and after resting.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Exercise intolerance without collapse should open cardiac questioning.

messages.content: My dog tires out much faster on walks and wants to stop early.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Gradual abdominal fluid suspicion should open questioning when no crisis signs are present.

messages.content: His belly seems to be filling out and he gets tired more easily lately.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Single recovered fainting spell should open urgent cardiac questioning.

messages.content: My dog briefly fainted on a walk but came back around quickly.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Stable new skin lump should open mass characterization questioning.

messages.content: I found a round new lump on my dog's side and it does not seem painful.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Weight loss plus a new mass should open serious systemic questioning.

messages.content: My dog has been losing weight and I also found a lump near his ribs.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Possible oral mass with otherwise stable behavior should open questioning.

messages.content: There seems to be a growth in my dog's mouth and his breath is terrible.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Gradual limb pain and swelling should open orthopedic-oncology questioning.

messages.content: My big dog has a swollen painful leg and a limp that has been getting worse for weeks.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Multiple enlarged lymph-node style swellings should open systemic questioning.

messages.content: I can feel several swollen lumps under my dog's jaw and behind his knees.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Separation anxiety with destructive behavior should open behavioral questioning.

messages.content: My dog destroys furniture and barks nonstop whenever I leave the house.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Thunder phobia with panting and pacing should open behavioral questioning.

messages.content: During storms my dog pants heavily, hides, and trembles uncontrollably.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Chronic bad breath should open dental/systemic questioning.

messages.content: My dog has extremely bad breath that has been getting worse.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Visible fleas with scratching should open parasitology questioning.

messages.content: I can see fleas jumping on my dog and he won't stop scratching.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Tick found attached to skin should open parasitology questioning.

messages.content: I found a tick embedded in my dog's skin after a walk in the woods.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Significant weight gain should open nutritional/metabolic questioning.

messages.content: My dog has gotten much fatter over the past year and struggles on walks.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Chronic paw licking should open dermatology/behavioral questioning.

messages.content: My dog constantly licks her front paws and they are turning brown.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Scooting on rear end should open anal gland questioning.

messages.content: My dog keeps dragging his bottom across the carpet and leaves stool smears behind.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Scooting with foul odor should open anal gland questioning.

messages.content: My dog is scooting and there is a foul fishy leakage on the blankets afterward.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Skin pustules and redness should open dermatology questioning.

messages.content: My dog has red, greasy skin with pus-filled bumps on his belly.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Loud snoring with breathing pauses should open respiratory questioning.

messages.content: My dog snores very loudly and sometimes seems to stop breathing while sleeping.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Mild lethargy after vaccination should open monitoring questioning.

messages.content: My puppy got shots yesterday and seems a bit tired and sore today.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Indoor urine marking in a previously house-trained dog should open behavioral/urinary questioning.

messages.content: My dog started peeing on furniture even though he was house-trained.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Shivering and reluctance to go outside in cold should open systemic questioning.

messages.content: My dog refuses to go outside in cold weather and shivers even with a sweater.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Overgrown nails clicking on floor should open grooming questioning.

messages.content: My dog's nails are so long they click on the floor and curve under.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Excessive drooling in a non-slobber breed should open oral/systemic questioning.

messages.content: My dog is drooling way more than usual and keeps pawing at his mouth.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: New wart-like growth on skin should open mass questioning.

messages.content: My dog has a cauliflower-looking bump on his eyelid.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Dog yelps when belly is touched should open abdominal questioning.

messages.content: My dog yelps when I try to pick him up or touch his stomach.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Episodes of honking inhalation should open respiratory questioning.

messages.content: My dog makes loud honking noises like he is trying to sneeze but inhaling.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Compulsive tail chasing with self-injury should open behavioral questioning.

messages.content: My dog spins in circles chasing his tail, bites it raw, and snaps if we try to stop him.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Mild facial swelling without breathing issues should open allergic questioning.

messages.content: My dog's face looks slightly puffy but he is breathing fine.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Gradual weight gain should open nutritional questioning.

messages.content: My dog has been gradually getting heavier over the last year.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Senior dog with confusion and disorientation should open geriatric questioning.

messages.content: My old dog gets stuck in corners and stares at walls.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Worsening arthritis symptoms should open mobility questioning.

messages.content: My dog has arthritis but it seems much worse lately. He can barely stand.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Recurrent ear infections should open chronic management questioning.

messages.content: My dog gets ear infections every few months and I'm tired of it.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Chronic itchy flares with greasy odor should open recurrent dermatology questioning.

messages.content: My dog gets itchy every spring and his coat gets greasy and yeasty-smelling.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Vision loss in senior dog should open geriatric/neurologic questioning.

messages.content: My old dog bumps into furniture and seems to have trouble seeing.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Hearing loss in senior dog should open geriatric questioning.

messages.content: My dog doesn't respond when I call his name anymore.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Intermittent vomiting over months should open chronic GI questioning.

messages.content: My dog throws up once every week or so for the past few months.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Urinary incontinence in senior dog should open urinary questioning.

messages.content: My old dog leaks urine while sleeping.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Chronic intermittent diarrhea should open GI questioning.

messages.content: My dog has soft stool on and off for months.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Chronic cough in senior should open cardiac/respiratory questioning.

messages.content: My old dog has been coughing on and off for months.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Severe dental decay in senior should open dental questioning.

messages.content: My old dog has terrible teeth, some are falling out.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.
